source: On-pattern batch: 2 fresh finds (web-sourced + verified) + 1 roster fit + 8 gold-standard reference examples. Worker retuned to this pattern for future auto-sourcing.
note: All female-led / personal, nano-micro travel, posted within 8 months. ★ = fresh lead to action; others are your reference examples.
